name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Turla LightNeuron Objects
notes: This Building Block triggers when a Turla LightNeuron object is loaded.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Turla LightNeuron Objects on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Object Load Success

when the event matches File Directory (custom) is any of [C:\Windows\ServiceProfiles\NetworkService\appdata\Local\Temp or C:\Windows\ServiceProfiles\NetworkService\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft or C:\Windows\ServiceProfiles\NetworkService\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows]
when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of [msmocf.xml or msmodl.dat or thumbcache_idx.db or thumbcache_32.db]
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Turla LightNeuron Objects on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Object Load Success

AND when the event matches File Directory (custom) is any of [C:\Windows\ServiceProfiles\NetworkService\appdata\Local\Temp or C:\Windows\ServiceProfiles\NetworkService\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft or C:\Windows\ServiceProfiles\NetworkService\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows]
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of [msmocf.xml or msmodl.dat or thumbcache_idx.db or thumbcache_32.db]
